summary: Comprehensive testing of TrustOffice Benevolence page refactoring complete. The page was successfully simplified from a confusing 2-tab system (Grants vs History) to a single unified log with filters. All 12 features verified working correctly.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - minor accessibility improvement possible

passed_tests: Benevolence page shows single unified log (NO TABS - verified)
Summary strip shows This Month ($0.00), This Year ($47,700.00), All Time ($52,700.00), Total Grants (5)
Search filter works - searching 'Thomas' shows 'Showing 1 of 5 records • Matching Thomas'
Date filter dropdown has all 6 options: All History, Last 30 Days, This Month, Last Month, This Year, Last Year
Purpose/Category filter dropdown has all categories: Medical Expenses, Housing Assistance, Education, Food & Necessities, Utilities, Transportation, Emergency Relief, Spiritual/Ministry, Other
Filter indicator shows 'Showing X of Y records' when filters are active
Clear button appears when filters are active (X Clear)
Empty state shows 'No Records Match Filters' message when no records match filters
Empty state shows 'Clear All Filters' button when filters produce no results
Empty state shows 'Record First Grant' button when no records exist (code verified)
Each record shows: recipient name (Thomas Williams), Documented badge, date (Feb 17, 2026), category (Housing Assistance), description (Emergency rent assistance...), amount ($3,200.00)
Record Grant button opens modal with: Recipient Name *, Recipient Type (Individual/Family/Organization), Purpose/Category, Amount *, Date, Description/Need, Notes (Optional) fields
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: BenevolencePage.js properly merges records from both /api/benevolence and /api/benevolence-log endpoints
PASS: Deduplication logic works by checking amount+date+recipient name
PASS: Data from both sources is sorted by date descending
PASS: Summary strip shows real-time totals (This Month, This Year, All Time, Total Grants)
PASS: All date filter options correctly implemented with date-fns functions
PASS: Empty states properly differentiate between 'no records exist' vs 'no records match filters'
MINOR: DialogContent missing aria-describedby for accessibility (console warning)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo data with 5 benevolence records (Thomas Williams, Maria Rodriguez, Johnson Family, Grace Community Church, Local Food Bank)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Benevolence page refactoring verified. The old 2-tab system (Grants vs History) has been replaced with a single unified log that merges data from both /api/benevolence and /api/benevolence-log endpoints. Filters work correctly: search by recipient, date range (6 options), purpose/category. Empty states show appropriate messages. Record Grant modal has all required fields.

unified_log_no_tabs.description: Single unified log replaces confusing Grants vs History tabs

search_filter.shows_indicator: Showing X of Y records • Matching 'term'

empty_state_no_matches.heading: No Records Match Filters
empty_state_no_matches.message: No benevolence records match these filters. Try broadening your date range or clearing filters.
